testcase.name: Registration › user can register a new account
testcase.error:
[chromium] › auth.spec.ts:9:7 › Registration › user can register a new account ───────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.fill: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByLabel('First name')
11 | 12 | await page.goto('/register'); > 13 | await page.getByLabel('First name').fill('New'); | ^ 14 | await page.getByLabel('Last name').fill('User'); 15 | await page.getByLabel('Email').fill(uniqueEmail); 16 | await page.getByLabel('Password').fill('Str0ng!Pass2024'); at C:\Users\newro\Documents\codes\claude\coworks\familyroots\frontend\e2e\specs\auth.spec.ts:13:41

testcase.name: OAuth — Google › login page shows Google sign-in button
OAuth — Google › clicking Google button redirects to backend OAuth endpoint
OAuth — Google › OAuth callback with error redirects to login with message
OAuth — Google › OAuth callback without token redirects to login
OAuth — Google › login page shows error banner for OAuth state mismatch
OAuth — Google › login page shows generic error banner for OAuth provider error
